'''âw-w-v''' ('''kawawav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:whiteknight|whiteknight]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-w-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whiteknight|whiteknight]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-w-v
|-
! Lemma
| kawawav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwawav|thiwawav]] || [[word:jiwawav|jiwawav]] || [[word:shiwawav|shiwawav]] || [[word:kiwawav|kiwawav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwawav|thuthuwawav]] || [[word:jujuwawav|jujuwawav]] || [[word:shushuwawav|shushuwawav]] || [[word:kukuwawav|kukuwawav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwawav|thuwawav]] || [[word:juwawav|juwawav]] || [[word:shuwawav|shuwawav]] || [[word:kuwawav|kuwawav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwawav|thuwawav]] || [[word:juwawav|juwawav]] || [[word:shuwawav|shuwawav]] || [[word:kuwawav|kuwawav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewawav|thewawav]] || [[word:jewawav|jewawav]] || [[word:shewawav|shewawav]] || [[word:kewawav|kewawav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowawav|thothowawav]] || [[word:jojowawav|jojowawav]] || [[word:shoshowawav|shoshowawav]] || [[word:kokowawav|kokowawav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowawav|thowawav]] || [[word:jowawav|jowawav]] || [[word:showawav|showawav]] || [[word:kowawav|kowawav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowawav|thowawav]] || [[word:jowawav|jowawav]] || [[word:showawav|showawav]] || [[word:kowawav|kowawav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwawav|thĂŠwawav]] || [[word:jĂŠwawav|jĂŠwawav]] || [[word:shĂŠwawav|shĂŠwawav]] || [[word:kĂŠwawav|kĂŠwawav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawawav|thathawawav]] || [[word:jajawawav|jajawawav]] || [[word:shashawawav|shashawawav]] || [[word:kakawawav|kakawawav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawawav|thawawav]] || [[word:jawawav|jawawav]] || [[word:shawawav|shawawav]] || [[word:kawawav|kawawav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawawav|thawawav]] || [[word:jawawav|jawawav]] || [[word:shawawav|shawawav]] || [[word:kawawav|kawawav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawawav|shawawav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawawav|goshawawav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawawav|gokishawawav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawawavnĂŒ|shawawavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawawavnknĂŒ|goshawawavnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawawavnĂŒ|gokishawawavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawawavshĂ«|shawawavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawawavnkshĂ«|goshawawavnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawawavshĂ«|gokishawawavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawawavro|shawawavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawawavnkro|goshawawavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawawavro|gokishawawavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawawavmu|shawawavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawawavnkmu|goshawawavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawawavmu|gokishawawavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawawavsher|shawawavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawawavnksher|goshawawavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawawavsher|gokishawawavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawawavng|shawawavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawawavnkng|goshawawavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawawavng|gokishawawavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawawavya|shawawavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawawavnkya|goshawawavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawawavya|gokishawawavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawawavyam|shawawavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawawavnkyam|goshawawavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawawavyam|gokishawawavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawawavnĂŒshĂ«|shawawavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawawavnknĂŒshĂ«|goshawawavnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawawavnĂŒshĂ«|gokishawawavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawawavnĂŒro|shawawavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawawavnknĂŒro|goshawawavnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawawavnĂŒro|gokishawawavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawawavnĂŒmu|shawawavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawawavnknĂŒmu|goshawawavnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawawavnĂŒmu|gokishawawavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawawavshĂ«nĂŒ|shawawavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawawavnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawawavnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawawavshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawawavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawawavshĂ«ro|shawawavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawawavnkshĂ«ro|goshawawavnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawawavshĂ«ro|gokishawawavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawawavshĂ«mu|shawawavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawawavnkshĂ«mu|goshawawavnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawawavshĂ«mu|gokishawawavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawawavronĂŒ|shawawavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawawavnkronĂŒ|goshawawavnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawawavronĂŒ|gokishawawavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawawavroshĂ«|shawawavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawawavnkroshĂ«|goshawawavnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawawavroshĂ«|gokishawawavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawawavromu|shawawavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawawavnkromu|goshawawavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawawavromu|gokishawawavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawawavmunĂŒ|shawawavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawawavnkmunĂŒ|goshawawavnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawawavmunĂŒ|gokishawawavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawawavmushĂ«|shawawavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawawavnkmushĂ«|goshawawavnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawawavmushĂ«|gokishawawavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawawavmuro|shawawavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawawavnkmuro|goshawawavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawawavmuro|gokishawawavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
